content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "XOR and Favorite Number". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/617/problem/E
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n. The second line contains n integers.
content.outputFormat: The output should be a single integer, the maximum XOR of two elements in the array.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a Trie data structure to store the binary representation of the numbers and then for each number, find the maximum XOR by traversing the Trie.
